/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/iPhoneOS.platform/Developer/SDKs/iPhoneOS26.2.sdk -miphoneos-version-min=15.0 -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/zlib_static_example.dir/example.c.o -o zlib_static_example.app/zlib_static_example  ../libz.a
